# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
- name: compute-instance
  type: compute.v1.instance
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
    machineType: zones/us-central1-a/machineTypes/e2-medium
    disks:
      - initializeParams:
          sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-10
        autoDelete: true
    networkInterfaces:
      - network: global/networks/default
        accessConfigs:
          - name: External NAT
            type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
    metadata:
      items:
        - key: startup-script
          value: |
            #!/bin/bash
            apt-get update && apt-get install -y apache2
- name: cloud-sql-instance
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.instances
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    settings:
      tier: db-n1-standard-1
      ipConfiguration:
        authorizedNetworks:
          - value: '0.0.0.0/0'
- name: cloud-storage-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    location: US
- name: load-balancer-backend-service
  type: compute.v1.backendService
  properties:
    healthChecks:
      - computeHttpHealthCheckRefs:
          - id: projects/my-project/global/httpHealthChecks/default-http-health-check
    backends:
      - groupRef:
          id: compute.instances.ref.my-project.us-central1-a.compute-instance
- name: load-balancer-forwarding-rule
  type: compute.v1.forwardingRule
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    target: $(ref.load-balancer-target-proxy.id)
    allowedProtocols: tcp
    portRange: '80'
- name: load-balancer-url-map
  type: compute.v1.urlMap
  properties:
    defaultServiceRef:
      id: $(ref.load-balancer-backend-service.id)
    hostRules:
      - hosts:
          - '*'
        pathMatcher: all-path-matcher
    pathMatchers:
      - name: all-path-matcher
        defaultServiceRef:
          id: $(ref.load-balancer-backend-service.id)
- name: load-balancer-target-proxy
  type: compute.v1.targetHttpProxy
  properties:
    urlMapRef:
      id: $(ref.load-balancer-url-map.id)
